text:
New version of Andika font is available on new website. From old linked website in Ports Collection you can find new, http://software.sil.org/andika/. Please update that link -> https://www.freebsd.org/ports/x11-fonts.html#Andika

1.004 --> 5.000 (28 Oct 2014)

http://software.sil.org/andika/download/
